title: Pan-Seared Canadian Fish Fry
description: Enjoy this simple and delicious pan-seared fish recipe, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Rinse the fish fillets under cold water and pat them dry with a paper towel.
Make the garlicky butter by mixing minced garlic with softened butter.
Season the fish fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat the stir fry oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the fish fillets to the skillet and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the fish to a plate and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the crunchy breadcrumbs and stir to toast for 1-2 minutes.
Serve the fish with the garlicky butter and toasted breadcrumbs.
